name: PB3 - TheHive Alert Notification
description: Playbook 3: Creates a structured alert in TheHive via SOAR proxy /notify endpoint. Makes the detected threat visible to SOC analysts in the incident management interface.

triggers.name: T-Pot Alert Webhook
triggers.description: Receives alerts from T-Pot Logstash HTTP output

actions.name: Extract Alert Fields
actions.description: Extract relevant fields from webhook payload

parameters.note: Adjust field names to match your Logstash output schema

actions.name: Create TheHive Alert
actions.description: POST to SOAR proxy /notify endpoint. Proxy creates structured alert in TheHive with source IP, description, severity, and tags.

body.title: Honeypot Alert: $exec.type
body.description: Automated alert from T-Pot honeypot. Source IP: $action-1.src_ip

notes.bottleneck: Docker container spawn + TheHive API call
notes.thehive_result: Alert created in TheHive UI under Alerts tab
notes.setup: TheHive API key is configured in SOAR proxy. TheHive must be running on port 9000.
